member.name: M:Conferenti.Application.Abstractions.Authentication.IAuthenticationService.GetServiceTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets authentication token for AI service communication (M2M)

member.name: M:Conferenti.Application.Abstractions.Authentication.IAuthenticationService.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Gets the current authenticated user from HTTP context Token validation is handled by JWT middleware
member.returns: User information if authenticated, null otherwise

member.name: M:Conferenti.Application.Abstractions.Authentication.IAuthenticationService.GetCurrentUserId
member.summary: Gets the current authenticated user's identifier
member.returns: User ID from current HTTP context

member.name: M:Conferenti.Application.AiAgents.IAiAgentService.SendChatMessageAsync(Conferenti.Domain.AiAgents.AiChatRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Service for communicating with Ai Agent.
